Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The objective is to transform a raw Windows system activity log into a standard Process Mining Event Log CSV like format Key requirements include defining Case IDs Activity Names and Timestamps while ensuring the resulting log tells a coherent story of user work

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Input Data Format Timestamp Action Type Attributes App Window Keys Action Direction etc Time Range 2024 12 11T08 59 50 to 09 08 15 approx 8 5 minutes Applications Microsoft Word Google Chrome Adobe Acrobat Microsoft Excel Windows Documents Quarterly Report docx Document1 docx Email Inbox Report Draft pdf Budget 2024 xlsx Actions FOCUS TYPING SAVE SWITCH CLICK SCROLL HIGHLIGHT CLOSE

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Determine Case Identification Strategy The Case Concept Option A One big case per user per day Too coarse Hides the distinct tasks being performed Option B One case per application switch Too fragmented A task often involves switching apps eg copying from Excel to Word Option C One case per document task Most logical for process mining office work

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analysis of Flow User starts with Quarterly Report docx Focus Switches to Document1 docx Focus Typing Save This looks like drafting a specific document Switches to Chrome Email Inbox Reads Sends email about Annual Meeting This is a distinct communication task Switches to Acrobat Report Draft pdf Reviewing Switches to Excel Budget 2024 xlsx Updating figures Switches back to Document1 docx Adding reference to budget Saving Closing Connection The Excel work fed into Document1 So Excel plus Document1 second session might belong to the same logical task Drafting Document 1

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I will group events into cases based on the primary artifact document being worked on Case 1 Document1 docx Drafting and Finalizing Includes the interlude with Excel because the Excel work was explicitly used to update Document1 Inserting reference to budget Case 2 Email Inbox Handling Annual Meeting Email Case 3 Report Draft pdf Reviewing Case 4 Quarterly Report docx Finalizing Quarterly Report

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refinement Actually looking closely at the timeline Revised Case Strategy To make it analyst friendly I should group contiguous work on a specific logical goal Case 1 Drafting Document1 Includes the initial typing the Excel update since it feeds the doc and the final save close Case 2 Handle Email AnnualMeeting Distinct communication task Case 3 Review Report Draft Distinct review task Case 4 Finalize Quarterly Report Distinct reporting task

Name: Validation - PE
Text: What about the first Quarterly Report focus at 08 59 50 It was abandoned immediately for Document1 It is likely an Open Check event that belongs to Case 4 or just noise I will assign it to Case 4 to show the lifecycle of that document What about Excel The Excel activity is immediately followed by switching back to Document1 to insert a reference This strongly suggests the Excel activity is a sub process of the Document1 case I will include Excel events in the Drafting Document1 case

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: What about Acrobat It sits between Email and Excel It looks like a reference check Since it is not explicitly linked back to Document1 in the text unlike Excel I will treat it as a separate Review case or potentially part of the Document1 research Lets keep it separate for clarity Review Reference Material as it does not have a direct Update link like Excel does

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Simplification for Process Mining To avoid over fragmentation I will group by Primary Document Task Case 101 Drafting Document1 Includes Word Document1 plus Excel Budget because of the explicit dependency Case 102 Process Email Chrome Inbox Case 103 Review PDF Acrobat Case 104 Edit Quarterly Report Word Quarterly Report

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I will assign Case IDs based on the Document Artifact being modified Interleaving is acceptable in process mining concurrency but for this specific exercise creating distinct cases per artifact makes the process flow clearer Refinement on Excel Since the user switches from Excel directly to Document1 to Insert reference the Excel activity is functionally part of the Document1 creation process I will assign Excel events to the Document1 Case ID to reflect this dependency

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Determine Activity Naming Raw actions FOCUS TYPING CLICK are too granular Need semantic names FOCUS plus TYPING to Edit Document or Draft Content SAVE to Save Document CLICK Open Email to Open Email CLICK Send Email to Send Email SCROLL HIGHLIGHT PDF to Review Document CLOSE to Close Document

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: SWITCH Usually ignored in process mining unless it signifies a handover I will exclude raw SWITCH events as they are technical UI events not business activities However the act of switching to an app to start work can be captured as the first event of that case Standardization Word Typing to Edit Content Word Save to Save Version Word Close to Finalize Document Email Open Read to Read Message Email Reply Send to Reply to Message Excel Typing to Update Data PDF Scroll Highlight to Review Material

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The final table must be sorted by Timestamp Exclusion I will exclude raw SWITCH and SCROLL events unless they signify a specific activity like Reviewing FOCUS at the start of a case is useful to mark Open Start FOCUS in the middle is noise

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Merging Multiple TYPING events in quick succession can be grouped or kept separate Keeping them separate allows for duration analysis but might be too granular I will group consecutive typing actions within the same window into a single Edit Content activity to reduce noise or keep them if the content differs significantly Actually looking at the timestamps 09 00 30 and 09 01 00 are 30s apart I will keep them as separate Edit events to show iteration

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Refining the Output Format CSV format is standard Columns Case ID Activity Timestamp Resource User Application optional but helpful I will add Application as a resource attribute column for context

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Review of Logic Case Grouping Based on the Artifact Document Email being processed Excel is grouped with Document1 due to explicit data dependency Inserting reference to budget Activity Abstraction Low level inputs Keys Clicks mapped to business activities Edit Save Send Noise Reduction SWITCH events removed they are transitions not activities Initial FOCUS treated as Open Start Chronology The final table must be sorted by Timestamp

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Constructing the Explanation Explain the Case ID logic Artifact centric Explain the Excel exception Data dependency Explain Activity Mapping Semantic abstraction Explain Noise Filtering Switch Focus removal

Name: Validation - PE
Text: One final check on Case 001 Is it better to keep Excel separate If I keep Excel separate the process is Update Budget If I merge the process is Draft Document incl Data Lookup Given the explicit text Inserting reference to budget in Word immediately after Excel merging them tells a stronger process story The drafting process requires budget data I will proceed with merging Excel into Case 001
